## Summary

<!-- Describe what this PR changes and why. Link to the relevant issue if one exists (e.g. "Closes #123"). -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Chore / dependency update

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested this change. -->

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Existing tests pass (`go test ./...` / `npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Manually verified in the local dev environment

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style of the surrounding files
- [ ] No magic strings introduced — constants used where applicable
- [ ] No debug logging or temporary code left in
- [ ] Documentation updated if a user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] `mkdocs.yml` nav updated if a new doc page was added
